prose.en: Verify the integrity of transmitted security and privacy attributes.

guidance.en: Part of verifying the integrity of transmitted information is ensuring that security and privacy attributes that are associated with such information have not been modified in an unauthorized manner. Unauthorized modification of security or privacy attributes can result in a loss of integrity for transmitted information.

prose.en: the integrity of transmitted security attributes is verified;
the integrity of transmitted privacy attributes is verified.

objects.en: procedures addressing the transmission of security and privacy attributes
system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing verification of the integrity of transmitted security and privacy attributes
